assumptions.name: Multiples used
assumptions.rationale: EV/Revenue applied whenever target revenue and >=1 peer revenue are present; EV/EBITDA additionally applied when target EBITDA and >=2 peers' EBITDA are positive.

assumptions.name: EV/Revenue median multiple
assumptions.rationale: Median across sector peers; 25/75 percentile drives low/high.

assumptions.name: EV/EBITDA median multiple
assumptions.rationale: Median across sector peers with positive EBITDA.

assumptions.name: Peer count
assumptions.rationale: Number of sector-matched peers found in the comps universe; drives confidence via min(1, n/8).

citations.description: Peer set: MA, PYPL, SQ, V (sector=FinTech, n=4)
